programme.title: How To Be Yours
programme.desc: Two people driven by their professional ambitions fall in love and are forced to reassess their goals as they encounter the trials of a serious relationship.

programme.title: Shake, Rattle & Roll 12
programme.desc: A young girl gets hold of a doll with evil intentions. A group of people struggle to survive on an island home to dangerous spirits. A funeral home hides a strange and horrifying secret behind its closed doors.

programme.title: Everything About Her
programme.desc: Powerful but ill-stricken business woman, Vilma Santos navigates her complicated relationship with her caregiver, Angel Locsin and her estranged son, Xian Lim in this story about acceptance, love and forgiveness.

programme.title: Mater Dolorosa
programme.desc: A woman runs her criminal syndicate all the while taking care of her family.

programme.title: Trophy Wife
programme.desc: A man visits his brother to meet his new bride, who turns out to be a former flame. This trophy wife appears to be playing a deadly game of seduction and revenge.

programme.title: Elevator
programme.desc: Trapped inside the elevator of a hotel casino complex, a lowly elevator boy falls in love with his investor's mistress that forces him to choose between his love for her, or his dreams for a better future.

programme.title: In Your Eyes
programme.desc: A woman marries her younger sister's boyfriend in order to give him immigrant status in the US, hoping to keep them together. But while her sister is away studying, this fake marriage becomes real as the two develop feelings for each other.

programme.title: ABNKKBSNPLAko? The Movie
programme.desc: The story of one young man over the years as he struggles through school and yearns for the love of one of his classmates.

programme.title: Fangirl Fanboy
programme.desc: The story of a wannabe actor and a talented teleserye dubber who agrees to help him improve his acting. Her coaching helps him achieve his dream of becoming a star only to find herself heartbroken when he becomes successful.

programme.title: Death Of A Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Christine was found brutally killed in the woods, her boyfriend, a forest ranger and a farmer are summoned for inquest. Each has a version to tell. But as the case deepens, they discover the shocking truth.
